titleStmt.title: SII 26.291: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 291. (A.R. No. 276 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: The inscription refers to the king as one ‘who was pleased to take Madurai and the crowned head of the Pāṇḍya’. It records a gift of land for burning a nandā lamp in the same temple at the same Tirukkachchūr as occuring in No. 290 above, by Kirāndai Amararkaṇāyakkar Kākkunāyakkan and his younger brother Tiruvālakkōyiluḍaiyān of the same Tirukkachchūr. It is stated that the gift-land was sold to one Kirandai Ārumaṇa-nāyanār by the many Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple who had undertaken to carry out the object of the gift with the money thus obtained. At the end of the inscription, there is a passage which refers to the 15th year of Perumāḷ (king) Sundarapāṇḍyadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirubhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅkoṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa
maṇṭalattuk kaḷattūrkkoṭṭattuc ceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭut tirukkaccūr Uṭaiyār tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku Ivvūrk kirāntai Amararkaṇāyakar kākkunāyakaṉum Ivaṉ tampi
tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiyāṉum Ivviruvom Iṉṉāyaṉāṟkuc cantirātittavarai celvatāka vaitta tirunun=tāviḷakku Oṉṟukku Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyil paṭṭapaṭi nilantaṭi 2ṉāl rūpāy 3 100 5 10 2m
Iṉṉilattukkuk kiḻtalaiyiṟ kiṇaṟoṉṟum vaṇṇakkaṉ kuṇṭil rūpāy 100 2 10m � kaḻaṉiyiṟ ceṭṭikkuṉṟakkuṇṭil rūpāy 5 10 3m Ākappatiṉāṟu cāṇkolāl rūpāy 5 100 2 10 5m
kiṇaṟoṉṟum Iṉṉilattāl vanta Iṟaiyuñ cilviṟai coṟupāṭṭum veṭṭi muṭṭe Āḷu ḷiṭṭa cilliṟai kaḷiṟai Iḻiccik kuṭukkak kaṭavomākac cilālekai paṇṇik kuṭu
ttom Ivviruvom Itu paṉmāhecuvararakṣai Ikkalveṭṭi Ippaṭi kuḻi Aiññūnṟu Irupattaiñcum kiṇaṟu Ikkoyiṟ kāṇi Uṭaiya civa
ppirāmaṇar palarum Ivvūr kirantai Ārumaṇa nāyanaārkku kāṇiyāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttu poruḷuk kaikkoṇṭu cantirātittavarai Ittirununtā viḷakku Oṉṟum tirunaṭaimāḷikai vaṭapār ttile perumāḷ cuntarapāṇṭitevaṟku 10 5vatu
Digital edition of SII 26.291 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
